docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUIZ, RAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALLO, ABRAHAM $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-02-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALLO, ABRAHAM
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RUIZ, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CALLO, ABRAHAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-25-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. TO BE HEARD WITH CASE NO. 824358.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CALLO, ABRAHAM
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CALLO, ABRAHAM
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
